summary.rationale: The workflow is now safer for parallel work because existing-run commands cannot silently resolve to shared repo state.

notes: Existing-run commands now require explicit targeting.
Repo-local action wrappers now follow the same explicit targeting rule.
Usage errors now tell the operator exactly how to provide the missing run id.
The protocol is more explicit and less surprising, even though this change is infrastructure-focused.
The change prefers clear, unobtrusive structure over convenience magic.

next_steps: Update any external helper scripts to pass run ids explicitly.
